episodes.title: Epstein survivors sue Google, Trump administration over personal information
episodes.description: The plaintiffs say the DOJ outed approximately 100 survivors of the convicted sexual predator when their private information was published, and they were identified to the world.

episodes.title: The Clintons oversight hearing on Epstein-relations released days after closed depositions
episodes.description:
Newly released video from the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform shows former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and President Bill Clinton under oath as part of its probe into the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

(Credit: NBC )
